bio: Mohammad-Taqi Mesbah Yazdi was an ultra-conservative Shia cleric and one of the most polarising ideologues of the Islamic Republic. He co-founded the [Haghani Seminary](/orgs/haghani-seminary) in Qom alongside [Ahmad Jannati](/people/ahmad-jannati), which trained a generation of hardline clerics and security officials. He was a member of the [Assembly of Experts](/orgs/assembly-of-experts) and a key ideological backer of [Mahmoud Ahmadinejad](/people/mahmoud-ahmadinejad). He was known for justifying violence against political opponents and opposing democratic reform. He died on 1 January 2021.
